# paar


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

This file will become your README and also the index of your documentation.

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you started.

### Install paar in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure paar package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to paar
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub [repository](https://github.com/vedicreader/paar):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/vedicreader/paar.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/vedicreader/paar)

``` sh
$ conda install -c vedicreader paar
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/paar/)

``` sh
$ pip install paar
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub [repository](https://github.com/vedicreader/paar)’s [pages](https://vedicreader.github.io/paar/). Additionally you can find package manager specific guidelines on [conda](https://anaconda.org/vedicreader/paar) and [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/paar/) respectively.
